indications.text:
Olopatadine Hydrochloride Ophthalmic Solution is indicated for the treatment of ocular itching
associated with allergic conjunctivitis.

PATADAY™ solution is indicated for the treatment of ocular itching associated with allergic
conjunctivitis.
